notes.dependency_note: Using Python 3.13 (python3) since coincurve is installed there; cryptography>=42 used as alternative in pyproject.toml for Python 3.14 compat
notes.alembic_note: Alembic configured for async SQLAlchemy; env.py uses sync connection for migrations with driver prefix stripping
notes.bdhke_note: Fixed hash_to_curve to use OLD NUT-00 algorithm (SHA256(msg) → try 02+hash as point, retry with SHA256(hash)). Also corrected one incorrect test vector.
notes.worker003_note: Worker 003 created significant infrastructure in parallel (crypto/, routers/keys.py, nuts/keyset_manager.py). Built on that foundation.

suggestion: Next priority: implement NUT-03 (swap), NUT-04 (mint), NUT-05 (melt) — the core protocol flows. Worker 002 should focus on these. Also, keyset_manager.py uses coincurve which requires Python 3.13; would benefit from a pure-Python or cryptography-based fallback.
